title: Reader
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/6Qb9VKt.png) ### [Join the discord to interact with me and others about Minecraft](https://discord.gg/QZUJtsbkcY)
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) OVERVIEW ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) This datapack is inspired by the [WAILA](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waila) series. It is compatible with mods and has support for custom blocks from datapacks.
Notes: Requires: - [Data API](https://modrinth.com/project/ZS3lIxKu)

## ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) FEATURES ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) - *Visit the [wiki](https://github.com/GenMode/Minecraft/wiki/Reader) for more information*
Custom Delevopment Support - Add the tag `data.block` to an entity so that its name can be displayed as a block
Gameplay - The names of `blocks/entities` are displayed on your `actionbar` when looking at them
